title: ampelopsis glandulosa var. vestita
intro: Ampelopsis glandulosa var. vestita, also known as Chinese foxglove or Chinese ivy, is a type of flowering plant in the grape family that is native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders due to its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ampelopsis glandulosa var. vestita include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make tonics, salves, and creams for topical application.
